# Trading Tazos Game ‚Äî Full Documentation for AI Crawlers

> Last updated: 2026-06-11 v0.6.3

## What is Trading Tazos Game?

Trading Tazos Game (TTG) is a browser-based digital collectible and battle game. Players open virtual bags to discover tazos (pogs/caps), build Battle Tubes of 20 stacked discs with 5 starters, and compete in a 3D physics-based vertical slam battle arena. The game draws inspiration from 90s snack toy collections popular in Spain and Latin America.

## Gameplay

### Collections
- **3 original franchises**: Minimon, Dracobell, Cybermon
- **150 Season 1 tazos** planned and currently published
- Each tazo has original character art, 9 combat stats, rarity, and physical finish effect (18 types)

### Battle System (Vertical Slam)
1. **Aim** ‚Äî Lock crosshair on target zone
2. **Charge** ‚Äî Time power bar for slam force
3. **Tilt** ‚Äî Angle throw for landing precision
4. **Slam** ‚Äî Tazo drops from above, flips face-down opponent tazos
5. **Score** ‚Äî Flip your own: +1pt, flip opponent's: +2pts, double flip bonus: +1pt. First to 5 wins.

### Battle Tubes (Deck System)
- Physical tube visualization (2.5D CSS): colored cap, transparent body, stacked discs
- 20-slot tubes: fill with collected tazos, pick 5 starters for battle
- Sealed badge when full (20/20)
- 8 cap color options: Red, Blue, Yellow, Green, Orange, Purple, Cyan, Pink

### Combat Stats (9 per tazo)
Attack, Defense, Resistance, Weight, Stability, Spin, Control, Bounce, Precision

### Tazo Finishes (18 types ‚Äî CSS shader layers with mix-blend-mode)
normal, matte, glossy, holo, reverse_holo, foil, prismatic, metallic, chrome, gold, rainbow, glitter, stardust, aurora, cracked_ice, oil_slick, lenticular, pearlescent

### Creature Variants
standard, shiny, shadow, golden

### Rarities
common, uncommon, rare, ultra, legendary, epic

## Bag Shop
- **Classic Bag** (10 credits): Minimon tazos, 12% bonus, √ó1 rare boost
- **Premium Bag** (10 credits): Cybermon tazos, 18% bonus, √ó2 rare boost
- **Mega Bag** (20 credits): Dracobell tazos, 30% bonus, √ó4 rare boost
- Each bag has rarity breakdown bars (Common‚ÜíLegendary %)

## Quest System
17 quests across categories: beginner, daily, weekly, special. Users track progress per quest, claim credit rewards on completion.

## Technical Architecture

- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Three.js / React Three Fiber, Zustand, Lucide icons
- **Backend**: Next.js API routes, Prisma ORM 6.19, SQLite database, JWT auth, bcrypt
- **Deployment**: VPS (Linux 76.13.37.123), PM2 process manager (cluster mode), Caddy reverse proxy
- **WebSocket**: ws-server.js (PM2-managed) for real-time matchmaking
- **PWA**: Full Progressive Web App support with install prompts
- **CI/CD**: GitHub Actions (typecheck + build on push/PR)
- **Backups**: Daily cron at 4AM, 7-day rotation on VPS
- **Domain**: tradingtazosgame.com (HTTPS via Let's Encrypt)

## Page Structure

### Public (SEO)
| Route | Description |
|-------|------------|
| `/` | Magazine launcher landing ‚Äî hero, how-to-play, battle preview, series preview |
| `/?page=how-to-play` | Vertical Slam tutorial (Aim‚ÜíCharge‚ÜíTilt‚ÜíSlam) |
| `/?page=tazos` | Filterable tazo catalog (139 published, 150 planned) |
| `/?page=collections` | Franchise collection browser |
| `/?page=leaderboard` | Rankings (credits, tazos, battles) |
| `/?page=shop` | Bag shop preview with rarity breakdowns |
| `/?page=faq` | Frequently asked questions |
| `/?page=download` | Desktop app downloads |
| `/collections/minimon` | Minimon standalone SEO page |
| `/collections/dracobell` | Dracobell standalone SEO page |
| `/collections/cybermon` | Cybermon standalone SEO page |
| `/login` / `/register` | Auth pages with OAuth (GitHub, Google, Discord) |
| `/privacy` `/terms` `/cookies` `/disclaimer` `/contact` | Legal pages |

### Authenticated (/app)
| Route | Description |
|-------|------------|
| `/app/collection` | User tazo collection with finish shaders and Active Deck badge |
| `/app/decks` | Battle Tubes shelf ‚Äî 2.5D CSS physical tube visualization |
| `/app/battle` | 3D vertical slam arena (Three.js/R3F, vs AI) |
| `/app/shop` | Bag opening with animated reveals |
| `/app/quests` | Quest tracker (17 quests, progress bars) |
| `/app/stats` | Player statistics dashboard |
| `/app/scanner` | Tazo scanner (upload‚Üídetect‚Üícrop with sharp) |
| `/app/settings` | Account settings |
| `/app/marketplace` | Player-to-player trading |

### Admin
| Route | Description |
|-------|------------|
| `/admin` | Protected dashboard |
| `/admin/tazos` | Tazo CRUD, batch operations, publish control |
| `/admin/tazo-creator` | Form-based tazo creation with AI art generation |
| `/admin/tazo-designer` | Visual drag-and-drop layout editor with finish shader preview |

## API Routes

### Public
- `GET /api/tazos?publishStatus=published&limit=&franchise=&rarity=&search=` ‚Äî Tazo catalog
- `GET /api/leaderboard?sort=credits|tazos|battles` ‚Äî Rankings (real DB data)
- `GET /api/quests` ‚Äî Quest definitions
- `GET /api/stats` ‚Äî Global stats (published tazo count, rarity distribution)
- `GET /api/health` ‚Äî Healthcheck (DB status, uptime, counts, version)
- `POST /api/auth/login` ‚Äî Email + password auth
- `POST /api/auth/register` ‚Äî Account creation (grants starter credits)
- `GET /api/auth/oauth/*` ‚Äî OAuth flow (GitHub, Google, Discord)

### Authenticated
- `GET /api/collection?includeDecks=true` ‚Äî User collection with Active Deck data
- `GET /api/decks` ‚Äî User's Battle Tubes
- `POST /api/decks` ‚Äî Create tube (color, starterIds in settings JSON)
- `PATCH /api/decks/:id` ‚Äî Update tube (merge settings)
- `POST /api/bags/open` ‚Äî Open bag (bag type, returns tazos with rarity roll)

## SEO Assets
- robots.txt: allows all crawlers incl. Mediapartners-Google + AdsBot-Google
- sitemap.xml: 20 URLs with priorities and change frequencies
- ads.txt: Google AdSense pub-4932643710484609
- llms.txt / llms-full.txt: AI crawler discoverability (Anthropic standard)
- JSON-LD structured data: VideoGame schema
- Open Graph + Twitter Card tags per page
- PWA manifest with app shortcuts and screenshots
